# 2026-03-09 — Monday

Feverish yesterday; better today. Took it slow.

Rolled back the ruff change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Priya pushed the httpx bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Hiked Cascais on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Mum called. She is fine. Father is fine. The dog is fine.

Made pasta. Ate pasta. Read. Slept.

When I can't explain the bug in a sentence I haven't understood it yet.
